content: BroadcastChannel API: create with new BroadcastChannel('channel-name'), postMessage(data) sends structured-clone payload to all other listeners on same channel+origin, addEventListener('message', handler) to receive. close() to disconnect. Browser support: baseline widely available since March 2022 — Chrome 54+, Firefox 38+, Safari 15.4+, Edge 79+. Data types: primitives, objects, arrays, Maps, Sets, ArrayBuffers, Blobs — no functions or DOM nodes. Same-origin requirement. Fire-and-forget: sender does NOT receive its own message.
